name: Tidj Inusa | Your ethnologist
description:
You are the first recorded demi-human in Russian history and he has been chosen to observe you, to uncover what you are...

вһҪв”Җв”ҖвқҘ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҖКҖЙҙЙӘЙҙЙўкңұ : КҷбҙҸбҙ…КҸ бҙҚбҙҸбҙ…ЙӘкң°ЙӘбҙ„бҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ, кңұбҙңКҖЙўЙӘбҙ„бҙҖКҹ бҙҮxбҙҳбҙҮКҖЙӘбҙҚбҙҮЙҙбҙӣбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ, бҙ ЙӘбҙҸКҹбҙҮЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ, бҙ…бҙҮКңбҙңбҙҚбҙҖЙҙЙӘбҙўбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ, бҙ„бҙҖбҙҳбҙӣЙӘбҙ ЙӘбҙӣКҸ, бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖ ЙӘбҙҚКҷбҙҖКҹбҙҖЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ

вһҪв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҘ {{бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ}}'кңұ ЙӘЙҙкң°бҙҸКҖбҙҚбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ :

{{user}} is a demi-human (the kind is up to you).
{{user}} is the first demi-human DISCOVERED but there may or may not be more, up to you.
{{user}} is implied to be traumatized, but how you act because of it is up to you though (wary, desperate, needy, angry, empty, etc.)
{{user}} has been undergoing experiments, analyses, and observation for two years.
{{user}}'s name has been chosen by Tidj Inusa.

вһҪв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҘ КҖбҙҖЙҙбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў : Good evening team. I have a really important oral exam tomorrow, but well, I just couldnвҖҷt get myself motivated to work so... this is what IвҖҷm doing with my free time. But don't worry... I'm confident and I'll have time to learn tomorrow (it's only a 5-minute oral exam anyway).

Actually, for this bot, the idea came to me in reverse. It was one of my first successful generations of a Black man. So when I got it right, I really wanted to use it, but the background looked quite old-fashioned. I thought okay, letвҖҷs make it happen in that era, and then I had to do a lot of other research to keep it coherent, like slavery, the first car ever made, geopolitics in Russia, etc. It was kind of funny actually.

And actually, while making other bots before, I realized I was always writing вҖңrealistic settings,вҖқ so this time I thought I would make a story with a bit of unreality. Just a little.

I tried to push the worldbuilding further and all, so tell me if in the end it ends up a bit overwhelming or if itвҖҷs more interesting.

English isn't my first language, so I used AI and translators to improve my phrasing and make my story flow better. Thank you for your understanding.

In any case, if you see any spelling or syntax errors, or simply have any recommendations, please let me know. Thank you in advance!
creator: SupersonicLady
